mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_management_list_member
AND list_id = #{params.member.listId} AND user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.userName}, '%') AND first_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.firstName}, '%') AND last_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.lastName}, '%') AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.email}, '%') AND address_line_1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.addressLine1}, '%') AND address_line_2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.addressLine2}, '%') AND city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.city}, '%') AND state LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.state}, '%') AND post_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.postCode}, '%') AND country LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.member.country}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_management_list_member (list_id, user_name, password, first_name, last_name, email, address_line_1, address_line_2, city, state, post_code, country) VALUES (#{params.member.listId}, #{params.member.userName}, #{params.member.password}, #{params.member.firstName}, #{params.member.lastName}, #{params.member.email}, #{params.member.addressLine1}, #{params.member.addressLine2}, #{params.member.city}, #{params.member.state}, #{params.member.postCode}, #{params.member.country})

INSERT INTO user_management_list_member (list_id, user_name, password, first_name, last_name, email, address_line_1, address_line_2, city, state, post_code, country) VALUES
(#{item.listId}, #{item.userName}, #{item.password}, #{item.firstName}, #{item.lastName}, #{item.email}, #{item.addressLine1}, #{item.addressLine2}, #{item.city}, #{item.state}, #{item.postCode}, #{item.country})
